person.name: Rhys Latimer Ap Bleddri Lord of Kilsant

nameForms.fullText: Rhys Latimer Ap Bleddri Lord of Kilsant

person.alternateName: Old Welsh, "Rhys Latimer ab Bledri Arglwydd Nghil Sant" Baron of Cil y Saint

zh.lifeSummary: Rhys Latimer Ap Bleddri Lord of Kilsant於1090年出生在威爾士。他和Angharad verch Llewelyn至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1194年享年104歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Rhys Latimer Ap Bleddri Lord of Kilsant于1090年出生在威尔士。他和Angharad verch Llewelyn至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1194年享年104岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name meaning ‘ardour’; borne in the Middle Ages by various rulers in south-west Wales, including  Rhys ap Tewdur  (  d. 1093 ) and  Rhys ap Gruffudd  (  1132–97 ).

variants.name: Reece
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Rhys . The name is now in widespread and frequent use outside Wales, in many cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the given name.

variants.name: Rees
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Welsh Rhys, in some cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the Welsh given name.

nameMeanings.name: Latimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a Latinist, a clerk who wrote documents in Latin, from Anglo-Norman French latinier, latim(m)ier. Latin was more or less the universal language of official documents in the Middle Ages, displaced only gradually by the vernacular – in England, by Anglo-Norman French at first, and eventually by English.

variants.name: Latner
meanings: English: occupational name for a worker in or maker of latten or brass, from Middle English latoun ‘brass’ (Old French laton). This name may sometimes have been confused with Latimer .
Altered form of German   Lattner   or   Lettner  .

variants.name: Lattner
meanings: German: occupational name for a carpenter who prepared or used laths or slats, from Middle High German latte ‘slat, lath’ + -n (plural suffix) + the agent suffix -er.

en.lifeSummary: Rhys Latimer Ap Bleddri Lord of Kilsant was born in 1090, in Wales. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Angharad verch Llewelyn. He died in 1194, at the age of 104.

fr.lifeSummary: Rhys Latimer Ap Bleddri Lord of Kilsant est né en 1090, à Galles. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Angharad verch Llewelyn. Il est décédé en 1194, à l’âge de 104 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Rhys Latimer Ap Bleddri Lord of Kilsant wurde 1090 in Wales geboren. Er hatte mit Angharad verch Llewelyn mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1194 im Alter von 104 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Rhys Latimer Ap Bleddri Lord of Kilsant è nato il nel 1090 nel Galles. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Angharad verch Llewelyn. Morì nel 1194, all'età di 104 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rhys Latimer Ap Bleddri Lord of Kilsantは1090年にウェールズで生まれた。彼はAngharad verch Llewelynとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1194年に104歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rhys Latimer Ap Bleddri Lord of Kilsant(은)는 1090년 웨일스에서 태어났다. 그는 Angharad verch Llewelyn(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1194년 104세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Rhys Latimer Ap Bleddri Lord of Kilsant nasceu em 1090, em Gales. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Angharad verch Llewelyn. Ele faleceu em 1194, com 104 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Rhys Latimer Ap Bleddri Lord of Kilsant родился в 1090 г. в местности Уэльс. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Angharad verch Llewelyn. Он умер в 1194 г. в возрасте 104 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Rhys Latimer Ap Bleddri Lord of Kilsant nació en 1090, en Gales. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Angharad verch Llewelyn. Murió en 1194, a la edad de 104 años.
